title: Act I — Clearfell to Ogham
routingNotes: Cemetery: do Draven first, then Asinia (drops scale with zone level)
Hunting Grounds league mech = Exalted Orb
Cemetery league mech = Regal Orb (save for lvl 16 or 28 base)
Aim to be Lvl 14 entering Geonor fight
speedrunTips: Play with urgency. Minimize town time and never stop moving in a zone.
Focus magic packs (~3.5x XP vs whites). Skip whites unless under-leveled.
Don't mule. Push to Red Vale weapon racks — guaranteed tier-2 Martial weapon.
Ration regals/exalts. 1-2 regals per act, on weapon bases at modifier breakpoints.
Stay on XP curve: margin = 3 levels under area + 1 per 16 character levels.

steps.text: Talk to Wounded Man, equip starter weapon
Loot Large Chests, equip items + skills

steps.reward: Unlocks Verisium Runeforging (Runic Ward on armour)
steps.note: Farrow is the new league NPC. Quest unlocks Verisium Runeforging — spend Verisium to add Runic Ward, a regenerating defence layer absorbing damage at 1 life. Free on sub-55 bases.

steps.text: Kill Beira of the Rotten Pack (north)
Enter Grim Tangle → take WP → return
Enter The Red Vale → take WP → return
Hut with Cauldron (flask upgrade) → Areagne Support Gem
steps.note: Areagne is the hardest early fight — frost bomb chills her, makes it manageable.

steps.text: Find 3 Obelisks of Rust, loot Runed Girdle each
The Rust King spawns on last obelisk
Kite mobs under his feet for AoE damage uptime
Talk to Renly, get Runed Spikes
Talk to Una, TP back to town
Talk to Una in town, TP to Grim Tangle
Mausoleum of the Praetor → Draven → Key Piece, TP back
steps.note: Doing Draven first keeps Asinia at higher level → better drops.

steps.text: Mausoleum of the Praetor — Forgotten Riches hidden cache
Tomb of the Consort → Asinia → Key Piece, TP back
Open Memorial Gate next to Lachlann
Exit to Hunting Grounds — take Waypoint
TP to town, talk to Finn, Una, The Hooded One
steps.note: The Hooded One revives upon return — Identify is now available.

zones.name: Hunting Grounds
zones.newIn05: Sparse zone now ships with navigation cues. After ritual encounter, follow trail of locusts → Freythorn entrance. Crowbells peck dead animals and leave blood trails to the boss. Signpost on the road indicates Ogham Village.

steps.note: Watch slam attacks — can one-shot. Boss flees at low HP, kite carefully.

steps.text: Enter Ogham Farmlands → take WP → return

steps.note: Big altar's smoke tendrils point to the small altars — follow them.

steps.text: Big Ritual Altar → kill The King in the Mists
Una's Lute Box in house near checkpoint → Una's Lute
steps.note: Deliver to Una in town for the reward.

steps.text: Rope on hanging man near checkpoint
Confirm Lvl 10 flask + Lvl 11 chest piece before entering Manor — much safer

steps.note: Usually after first walkway, sometimes earlier — drops Essence + double-res belt.
Phase 2: dodge roll under his sword. Frost bomb at start of Phase 2 chills him.

steps.text: Talk to The Hooded One → "Follow the Beast's Trail"
